vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are indistinguishable or absent. P3 (Pothos) is present but shows no foliage, only the scale anchor (white rabbit).

plant_audit.P1: No specimen detected. Soil appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2: No specimen detected. Pot contains only substrate.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present. No Pothos foliage visible.
plant_audit.P4: No specimen detected. Shared space with P2 is empty.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark, damp appearance across all pots. No visible fungal blooms or surface moss.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Presence of a white cylindrical object (likely a supplement or tool) introduced in T-4 and remaining through current.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: Initial state shows a small green sprout in the black pot (P3/P4 area).
temporal_deltas.t-5_to_t-1: Sprout appears to have withered or been removed. Introduction of a metallic object (spoon) in T-5, replaced by a white cylindrical object in T-4.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Static. No further biological development or movement.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological dormancy or failure. The lack of visible foliage in any pot suggests a complete loss of the registered specimens.
anomalies: Introduction of white cylindrical object (T-4 to Current).
Loss of initial green sprout (T-5 to T-4).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a critical failure in the botanical environment. Starting from the earliest image, a single green sprout was visible, but it vanished by T-4. Since then, the pots have remained devoid of plant life. The presence of the white rabbit anchor in P3 is the only constant. The environment is currently a 'dead' biome with no signs of active growth or recovery.
